'''dhasazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jiggermast|jiggermast]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jiggermast|jiggermast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhasazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæsæzhæth|dhæsæzhæth]] || [[word:dhæsæzhæj|dhæsæzhæj]] || [[word:dhæsæzhæsh|dhæsæzhæsh]] || [[word:dhæsæzhæ|dhæsæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasasazhath|dhasasazhath]] || [[word:dhasasazhaj|dhasasazhaj]] || [[word:dhasasazhash|dhasasazhash]] || [[word:dhasasazha|dhasasazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasazhath|dhasazhath]] || [[word:dhasazhaj|dhasazhaj]] || [[word:dhasazhash|dhasazhash]] || [[word:dhasazha|dhasazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasafzhath|dhasafzhath]] || [[word:dhasafzhaj|dhasafzhaj]] || [[word:dhasafzhash|dhasafzhash]] || [[word:dhasafzhaf|dhasafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhasazhatha|dhasazhatha]] || [[word:dhasazhaja|dhasazhaja]] || [[word:dhasazhasha|dhasazhasha]] || [[word:dhasazhaka|dhasazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhasazhath|dhasazhath]] || [[word:dhasazhaj|dhasazhaj]] || [[word:dhasazhash|dhasazhash]] || [[word:dhasazha|dhasazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhasazhathal|dhasazhathal]] || [[word:dhasazhajal|dhasazhajal]] || [[word:dhasazhashal|dhasazhashal]] || [[word:dhasazhakal|dhasazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhasazhathatha|dhasazhathatha]] || [[word:dhasazhajaja|dhasazhajaja]] || [[word:dhasazhashasha|dhasazhashasha]] || [[word:dhasazhaka|dhasazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhasazhathan|dhasazhathan]] || [[word:dhasazhajan|dhasazhajan]] || [[word:dhasazhashan|dhasazhashan]] || [[word:dhasazhakan|dhasazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhasazhathaoro|dhasazhathaoro]] || [[word:dhasazhajaoro|dhasazhajaoro]] || [[word:dhasazhashaoro|dhasazhashaoro]] || [[word:dhasazhakaoro|dhasazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
